items.title: Kodak EC35 is a dirt-cheap point-and-shoot film camera
items.summary: Following the success of its $99 Kodak-branded Snapic A1, Reto Project is releasing the Kodak EC35, an even more affordable 35mm film camera for just $34.99. The EC35 certainly...

items.title: Can an Apple lawsuit derail OpenAI’s hardware plans?

items.title: NASA shares beautiful timelapse of the Psyche spacecraft's view over Mars
items.summary: The spacecraft made a close approach to the red planet in May on its way to explore the asteroid it's named after.
